headline: How Incyte’s AI-Powered R&D Partnerships At Incyte (INCY) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In May 2026, Incyte and Edison Scientific announced a collaboration to embed Edison’s Kosmos AI platform across Incyte’s discovery and development lifecycle, while Incyte also expanded its partnership with Genesis Molecular AI through a US$120,000,000 investment and at least five new small‑molecule targets under the GEMS platform. Together, these agreements mark a shift toward treating Incyte’s proprietary data as a compounding asset, with AI systems continuously learning to support target...
